org.bukkit.block

Interface ShulkerBox

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BlockState, InventoryHolder, Lockable, Metadatable, Nameable

    public interface ShulkerBox
extends BlockState, InventoryHolder, Lockable, Nameable
    Represents a ShulkerBox.
